overall.description: First-person walk through a toxic foggy industrial harbor in a video game (Cyberpunk 2077). The player moves along a dockside walkway past a large cargo ship, industrial cranes, and factory chimneys, transitioning to an open waterfront with passing vehicles and digital billboards visible through the dense yellow smog.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial dockside walkway alongside cargo vessel

events.description: camera briefly pans down to look at metal stairs descending to harbor water
vehicle passes by on the parallel road to the right

agents.ego_description: walking along the industrial dock with a large cargo ship to the left, briefly glancing down at the water access stairs

notable_agents.action: flying vehicle hovering above the industrial harbor area
car driving along the road parallel to the walkway

entered.detail: massive white and blue vessel with red stripe docked in the harbor basin
large red steel crane structure spanning across the dry dock
tall smokestacks emitting smoke into the yellow fog
dark water in the industrial harbor basin with concrete walls
metal staircase with railings descending to the water level

segments.scene_description: Walking along a foggy industrial dock with a massive cargo ship to the left. The camera briefly looks down at metal stairs leading to the water, then continues forward past bollards. A flying vehicle hovers in the distance above the industrial cranes and factory chimneys.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade transitioning past the docked vessel

events.description: passing the bow of the large cargo ship
moving past the ship into the more open waterfront area with ocean view

agents.ego_description: continuing along the walkway past the massive ship hull, approaching the open water

notable_agents.action: dark car with red taillights driving away along the coastal road

entered.detail: large illuminated advertisement screen with colorful graphics visible through the fog
tall modern street light with glowing orange lamp

segments.scene_description: Passing the bow of the massive cargo ship, the scene opens slightly to reveal a digital billboard ahead. The industrial cranes fade into the fog behind as the walkway continues alongside the ship's hull, with vehicles passing on the road to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: open coastal highway with waterfront walkway and ocean view

events.description: passing the digital billboard on the right side of the path
dark SUV passes closely on the right road

agents.ego_description: walking along the open waterfront with foggy ocean visible to the left, vehicles passing on the adjacent road

notable_agents.action: dark SUV driving past on the wet asphalt road

entered.detail: expansive foggy sea visible beyond the harbor walls
metal safety railing along the waterfront edge

segments.scene_description: Now past the ship, the walkway opens to reveal the foggy ocean on the left, protected by a metal guard rail. The digital billboard is passed on the right as vehicles continue to drive along the parallel road. The industrial harbor gives way to the open waterfront.

scene_state.functional_zone: exposed waterfront walkway at the ocean's edge

events.description: camera moves closer to the water's edge and looks down at the railing
approaching the end of the walkway with direct view of the water

agents.ego_description: approaching the water's edge, observing the foggy ocean and the swimming ladder descending into the water

notable_agents.action: vehicle driving along the coastal road in the distance

entered.detail: yellow metal ladder attached to the dock edge descending into the ocean
black posts with yellow stripes along the walkway edge

segments.scene_description: Approaching the end of the waterfront walkway, the camera moves closer to the water's edge. A yellow swimming ladder descends into the foggy ocean, and bollards line the path. The open sea stretches out to the horizon through the dense yellow fog.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement along a toxic industrial dock that gradually opens into a vast, smog-filled waterfront. It begins by walking past a massive cargo ship and metal stairs leading to the water, while a flying vehicle hovers above distant cranes and factory chimneys. As the camera passes the ship's bow, the industrial structures fade into the yellow fog and the view expands to reveal a digital billboard and vehicles driving along a parallel road. The scene then shifts as the walkway clears the ship, opening up to the foggy ocean protected by a metal guard rail. Finally, the camera approaches the water's edge, passing a yellow swimming ladder and bollards as the open sea stretches toward the horizon through the dense haze.
